name: Grommash
shortDescription: Frontline warlord that breaks lanes through brute pressure and impact swings.
shortLore: A conqueror pulled from a dead empire that still answers only to the drumbeat of war.
fullLore: Grommash once carried a shattered empire on his back until the last citadel burned around him. Dragged into the Multiverse by a collapsing battle rite, he now treats every arena as a siege that must end in obedience or ruin.
